com.solace.connector.core.io.provider

Packages that use com.solace.connector.core.io.provider
Package
Description
com.solace.connector.core.io.provider
Supporting classes to provide contextual meta-information about a binder to the Micro-Integration framework.
  • Classes in com.solace.connector.core.io.provider used by com.solace.connector.core.io.provider
    Class
    Description
    ConsumerBindingCapabilities
    Capabilities for a specific consumer binding.
    ConsumerBindingCapabilities.ConsumerAckMode
    Consumer acknowledgment modes.
    ProducerBindingCapabilities
    Capabilities for a specific producer binding.
    ProducerBindingCapabilities.ProducerAckMode
    Producer acknowledgment modes.
